wake_decision_id_note: Handoff suggested 'd-003 (or next free id)'; wake auto-assigned d-097.
ordering_notes: First push attempt: tag pushed before main → CI fetched origin/main while still at 934f896, the tag's commit 2ef1009 was not yet reachable from main, verify-release-gates failed by design (race window ~seconds). Resolved by then pushing main and `gh run rerun --failed`. Lesson: push main BEFORE the tag on future GA runs; capture as a follow-up note in dev/design/release.md § Pre-tag procedure if the operator playbook reorders steps.

Second failure on the run: post-publish-smoke (pypi-wheel) raced PyPI index propagation (~1m gap between publish-pypi success and smoke; pip resolver did not see 0.6.1 yet). Resolved by rerun once PyPI showed 0.6.1 in /pypi/fathomdb/json (about 2 minutes after publish-pypi finished). smoke-pypi-wheel.sh has no retry — candidate hardening for a future WF-FIX-N slice.

ga_commit_chain.v_close: 8c5c9a3 docs(0.6.1): V slice CLOSED — fresh-install verification GREEN
